titleEn: Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered
titleZh: 澳大利亚首批商业化卵内性别鉴定雏鸡交付
summaryZh: 澳大利亚专业育种公司SBA成功交付全国首批商业化卵内性别鉴定雏鸡，采用Agri Advanced Technology的Cheggy技术，通过非侵入式高光谱光学分析在孵化前确定雏鸡性别。该技术已在德国、法国、巴西和美国等国家商业化应用，在欧盟市场渗透率达28%。消费者调查显示84%受访者有意购买卵内性别鉴定鸡蛋，66%愿意支付溢价。这标志着澳大利亚蛋鸡产业在动物福利和精准养殖领域的重要里程碑。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了卵内性别鉴定这一精准养殖技术在蛋鸡产业中的商业化落地，直接关联智慧畜牧中的自动化检测、动物福利与消费者需求响应，对国内蛋鸡产业的技术升级具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Company News In-ovo sexing Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered McLean Farms first egg producer to receive the technology 15 June 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Oceania Specialised Breeders Australia (SBA) has delivered the country's first commercial in-ovo sexed day-old chicks to McLean Farms, making it the first egg producer in Australia to receive chicks produced using in-ovo sex determination technology, according to a company press release. The inaugural placement was made in June 2026. In May, SBA announced it had become the first company in the Asia-Pacific region to introduce in-ovo sexing for commercial egg producers, using Agri Advanced Technology's Cheggy technology. Cheggy uses non-invasive, hyperspectral light-based optical analysis to determine the sex of a chick prior to hatching at a commercially viable scale.With the first commercial placement now complete, Australia joins a growing number of countries — including Germany, France, Brazil and the United States — where the technology is being used commercially. In the EU, in-ovo sexing technology has reached 28% market penetration.According to an Australian consumer survey conducted by Ipsos in August 2025 on behalf of Innovate Animal Ag, 84% of 1,000 respondents expressed interest in purchasing in-ovo sexed eggs, and 66% were willing to pay a premium.SBA will produce in-ovo sexed chicks as an additional product offering from June 2026, registered with the "Certified Humane" trademark."The delivery of Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks is a proud moment for SBA and a genuine milestone for our industry," said Eugene Viljoen, chief executive officer of Specialised Breeders Australia. "As Australia's market-leading supplier of commercial layer genetics, we are investing in innovations that support the long-term needs of egg producers: our belief is that Australian producers deserve access to the best technology the world has to offer and should be able to produce new products in response to changing consumer expectations.""The commercial delivery of in-ovo sexed chicks is a positive development for our industry, that will provide greater, high-welfare product options for layers and the end consumer," said Melinda Hashimoto, chief executive officer of Egg Farmers of Australia. "We congratulate SBA and McLean Farms on this milestone." Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all China's chicken imports to fall as output grows Markets & policy Imports and Exports 17 July 2026 1 minute read US to impose 25% tariff on most Brazilian imports from July 22 Markets & policy Market trends Markets and economics 16 July 2026 2 minute read Beef, coffee and aircraft exempted as Lula vows WTO challenge China's chicken exports surge 51% in early 2026 Markets & policy Market trends Markets and economics 16 July 2026 1 minute read Breast meat leads as producers target Japan and Middle East Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International
translationZh:
专业育种澳大利亚公司（SBA）已向McLean Farms交付了该国首批商业化卵内性别鉴定一日龄雏鸡，使其成为澳大利亚首家接收采用卵内性别鉴定技术生产的雏鸡的蛋鸡生产商，据公司新闻稿称。首次投放于2026年6月完成。

今年5月，SBA宣布成为亚太地区首家为商业化蛋鸡生产商引入卵内性别鉴定技术的公司，采用Agri Advanced Technology的Cheggy技术。Cheggy利用非侵入式、基于高光谱光学的光学分析，在孵化前以商业化可行规模确定雏鸡性别。

随着首次商业化投放的完成，澳大利亚加入了越来越多已商业化应用该技术的国家行列，包括德国、法国、巴西和美国。在欧盟，卵内性别鉴定技术的市场渗透率已达28%。

根据Ipsos于2025年8月代表Innovate Animal Ag进行的一项澳大利亚消费者调查，1000名受访者中有84%表示有意购买卵内性别鉴定鸡蛋，66%愿意支付溢价。

SBA将从2026年6月起将卵内性别鉴定雏鸡作为附加产品提供，并注册了“Certified Humane”商标。

“澳大利亚首批商业化卵内性别鉴定雏鸡的交付对SBA而言是一个自豪的时刻，也是我们行业真正的里程碑，”专业育种澳大利亚公司首席执行官Eugene Viljoen表示。“作为澳大利亚商业化蛋鸡遗传材料的市场领先供应商，我们正在投资支持蛋鸡生产商长期需求的创新：我们相信澳大利亚生产商应获得世界最佳技术的支持，并应能够根据不断变化的消费者期望生产新产品。”

“卵内性别鉴定雏鸡的商业化交付对我们行业而言是一个积极的发展，将为蛋鸡和最终消费者提供更多、更高福利的产品选择，”澳大利亚蛋鸡养殖者协会首席执行官Melinda Hashimoto表示。“我们祝贺SBA和McLean Farms取得这一里程碑。”
contentHtml:
Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered 
McLean Farms first egg producer to receive the technology
